payload.title: June 2023 Crime Report
payload.description: Monthly crime statistics report for the NYCT Subway system, submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau for the month prior to the reporting period.

payload.claim_text: The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies (including homicide, robbery, assault, and rape) in addition to hate crimes occurring in the NYCT Subway system.
payload.subject: June 2023 Crime Report

payload.claim_text: The report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis for the month prior to the reporting period.
payload.description: Report submitted monthly by NYPD's Transit Bureau

tool_args.label: Figures are preliminary and subject to revision

payload.gap_text: FIGURES ARE PRELIMINARY AND SUBJECT TO FURTHER ANALYSIS AND REVISION
payload.description: All crime statistics and activity figures in this report are preliminary and subject to revision after further analysis.

tool_args.label: Report published by NYPD Transit Bureau

payload.description: The June 2023 Crime Report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis.
The report provides statistics on major felonies and hate crimes occurring in the NYCT Subway system.
The report is titled MTA Report / June 2023 Crime Report and is prepared for Committee Members.
